subcodes.first_line: O students of the school! Praise be to God that in your tests ye have manifested and demonstrated excellence of capacity and capability [3.5s]... ...It is incumbent upon Baha’í children to surpass other children in the acquisition of sciences and arts
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای تلامیذ دبستان حمد خدا را که در امتحان حسن استعداد و قابلیت ظاهر و عیان
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @call to acquire knowledge; sciences
